name: claude-setup
description: Marketplace for the dev-workflow and craft-workflow plugins: opinionated Claude Code workflows for code (Ruby on Rails, Python) and non-code deliverables (design, content, research).

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Opinionated polyglot dev workflow: language-agnostic TDD spine + Ruby/Rails and Python packs, migration safety, language-aware fixer agents, and a deterministic pre-commit gate.

plugins.name: craft-workflow
plugins.description: Opinionated workflow for non-code deliverables: a domain-neutral method (discovery → criteria-first → produce → review loop) with experience-design, content, and research packs that orchestrate popular design/marketing/research skills.
